title: aerobion citratum
intro: Aerobion citratum, also known as the Lemon Balm or Citrus Melissae, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, characterized by its lemon-scented leaves and small yellow flowers. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Aerobion citratum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of indigestion and nausea. Herbal preparations of Aerobion citratum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
